aries.horoscope_text: Some enlightening conversations could occur today with a partner, Aries, possibly romantic, possibly career-related. New methods of operation could come to your attention, perhaps involving modern technology that could speed up the process and increase your income. Bear in mind that some of what you hear may not be feasible for a while. Other ideas may never be practicable. Remember to remain objective and check out the facts.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — Someone pitched a new framework in standup. Verify it isn't just localStorage with extra steps.
aries.prophecy: A partner brings you a revolutionary new tool. It's a wrapper around a library you already use.

taurus.horoscope_text: Hard work on a particular enterprise for too long a time could finally lead to an increase in income, Taurus. Creativity or innovation could be involved. Don't be surprised if you find yourself on the receiving end of compliments. You'll be feeling proud and confident, and you certainly have good reason. Buy yourself a present. Take your partner out for a celebration. You deserve it.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — Six months of grinding finally ships clean. Buy yourself a keyboard.
taurus.prophecy: Your long grind finally pays off. Your manager mentions it in the all-hands. Someone else gets the promotion.

gemini.horoscope_text: You tend to be adventurous at the calmest of times, Gemini. Today you could be feeling especially daring. You might be tempted to make some radical changes in your life, particularly where your profession is concerned. You could decide to make your living in an offbeat way, or possibly move to a place you've never considered before. Think about it for a few days. The impetus might pass. If it doesn't, then follow your heart.
gemini.deploy_today: No — You're one bad standup away from rewriting the whole stack in Rust.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say make a bold career move. You will rename three variables and call it a rewrite.

cancer.horoscope_text: You tend to be rather intuitive, Cancer, but today your psychic abilities could seem more focused than usual. You're better able to tune in to thoughts, feelings, and events. If you give readings, this is a good day for it, because you're apt to be more accurate than usual. Don't do too many or you could lose your focus and not do anyone else any good. Work steadily and pace yourself.
cancer.deploy_today: Yes — Your intuition is sharp today. You will guess the bug's location before opening the stack trace.
cancer.prophecy: Your intuition is unusually sharp today. You will still misread the error message the same way you always do.

leo.horoscope_text: Today your mind is apt to be turning to discussions of money, Leo. Conversations, perhaps job related, perhaps social encounters with friends, could turn to the subject of new income opportunities through modern technology.
leo.deploy_today: Maybe — Someone brings up crypto or AI in Slack. Nod politely. Keep coding.
leo.prophecy: The stars say new income through technology awaits. Someone in Slack is pitching you an NFT again.

virgo.horoscope_text: New opportunities, perhaps involving writing or speaking, could appear on the horizon along with the current planetary energy, Virgo. The forecast suggests that Virgos should carefully evaluate any prospects that emerge, as rushing into commitments isn't advisable for this practical sign. The reading emphasizes the importance of gathering all relevant details before making decisions, while also cautioning against prolonged deliberation, since circumstances may shift. Those interested in presented opportunities should investigate promptly to avoid missing advantageous possibilities.
virgo.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll evaluate the opportunity thoroughly. The opportunity was a Jira ticket.
virgo.prophecy: A new opportunity involving writing appears. It's the RFC nobody else wanted to draft.

libra.horoscope_text: Letters, phone calls, or emails from afar could put you in touch with new, interesting people. These people could well bring some fascinating ideas your way, Libra. Shared knowledge can lead to mutual advancement on material and spiritual levels. This process just might turn a casual acquaintance into a firm friend. Expect a lot of contact with these people for a long time to come. Enjoy your day.
libra.deploy_today: Yes — New contacts, good energy, no drama. Ship it while the vibes hold.
libra.prophecy: An email from afar brings fascinating new ideas. It's a recruiter. It's always a recruiter.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The current aspects encourage cultivating your spirituality, Scorpio. However advanced you are on your spiritual journey, there are revelations, awakenings, and new experiences waiting. Visit a church or a secluded spot in nature that speaks to you and soak up the energy. Indulge in some investigation. Check out some books on spirituality and symbols, and pay attention to your dreams.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Today calls for reflection, not deploys. Go stare at the logs like they're tea leaves.
scorpio.prophecy: The universe says seek revelations in quiet spaces. You will find one in the deprecated code nobody documented.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: A new opportunity could come your way today, Sagittarius. It might seem like a dream come true, the chance you've been waiting for, but you'll still want to think about it a bit. The forecast advises that this opportunity could disrupt your life and romantic circumstances, so careful consideration of the facts is recommended before making any commitments.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Maybe — A dream opportunity appears. Read the contract, or in this case, the PR description, first.
sagittarius.prophecy: A dream opportunity arrives today. It's a lateral move to a team with worse on-call.

capricorn.horoscope_text: New communications equipment may make whatever work you do that much easier to do, Capricorn. You might have some doubts about your ability to use it, but don't worry. You'll be able to deal with it as well as anyone. You'll find that it will open up new doors for you, both with regard to compiling information and staying in contact with old and new friends. Go to it!
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — New tooling makes everything smoother today. Even the CI runner seems to like you.
capricorn.prophecy: New equipment opens doors for you. IT approved your laptop upgrade request. Only took eight months.

aquarius.horoscope_text: A long-term friendship could suddenly develop into something more now, Aquarius. A close friend differently, recognizing previously unnoticed attraction. While this realization might feel surprising initially, the horoscope recommends proceeding thoughtfully rather than dismissing the possibility outright. The key advice is to remain flexible and observe how the situation naturally unfolds.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Stay flexible today. Especially around that legacy module you've quietly grown fond of.
aquarius.prophecy: An old friendship turns into something new. Turns out you actually like that codebase you used to complain about.

pisces.horoscope_text: Too much is on your mind right now, Pisces, and so you could have trouble sleeping. When you do manage to drop off, you could experience bizarre dreams. This is the only downside to your present situation, however. Everything else should be going very well. It might help to take a walk at night before you go to bed. This clears your head, gets the endorphins going, and works off excess energy.
pisces.deploy_today: Yes — Everything's actually fine today. Your racing thoughts are just left over from yesterday's incident channel.
pisces.prophecy: Too much is on your mind, so sleep will be rough. You'll dream about the merge conflict. It will not have resolved itself by morning.
